name: aquamanga-paperback-repo
description: Custom Paperback iOS extension repository for AquaManga (aquareader.net)

scripts.postbundle: bash -c 'mkdir -p bundles/dist/AquaManga/includes && mv bundles/dist/AquaManga/index.js bundles/dist/AquaManga/source.js && mv bundles/dist/AquaManga/static/icon.png bundles/dist/AquaManga/includes/icon.png && rm -rf bundles/dist/AquaManga/static'
